negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_e3657e3e-2875-460b-b9eb-56502c76c0fd
prompt: A video captures a woman adorned in traditional Indian bridal attire, showcasing intricate jewelry and elaborate embroidery. The scene is illuminated with a medium, eye-level shot that gradually tracks to the right. She wears a luxurious pink and gold sari with heavily embroidered borders draped over her right shoulder. Her shiny, pink, long-sleeved blouse complements the sari, adorned with similar ornate detailing. On both upper arms are golden, embroidered details with blue gems at the top and purple gems at the bottom. Her hair is styled in a neat, low bun, embellished with a traditional headpiece that features rich gold patterns and sparkling purple stones on the right side of her head. On her forehead is a matching piece that covers most of it. Around her neck, she wears a necklace composed of layered sparkles that catch the light with every slight movement. Her makeup, though subtle, accentuates her eyes.  At the beginning of the scene, the woman is seen standing sideways, looking over her right shoulder with a warm smile, and slowly turning to her right as the scene progresses. A black bar comes in from the right of the frame, partially blocking it. Once she has fully turned her body, the smile fades, and she gracefully turns her head back to the left. At the same time, the camera begins to track to the left. The background glistens with twinkling lights that hang on the right of the frame. Above are bright, white lights hung circularly. In the distance, a soft, purple smoke lingers while allowing the gently blurred figures in white to move in the background. Far beyond, the background is entirely black, allowing the figure to stand out vividly.
